hero_subtitle: SFTY Business connects compliance checks, case management, and audit evidence into one controlled workflow to prepare digital asset teams for regulatory inspections.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: AML compliance teams struggle with dispersed case data and disconnected provider outputs that delay review cycles. This fragmentation complicates audit readiness and weakens the traceability of decisions during regulatory inspections.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates provider outputs, alerts, reviewer actions and audit evidence into a unified compliance workflow that streamlines case reviews and strengthens inspection readiness for AML teams.
workflow_description: SFTY routes alerts through configurable rules into structured cases complete with decision logs and preserved evidence for regulatory inspection readiness.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented checks. One audit-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY turns disconnected compliance outputs into structured workflows, decisions, evidence and reports that support audit-ready inspection and regulatory compliance for VASPs.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs in managing audit-ready evidence and provider orchestration through controlled workflows and enterprise-grade deployment for regulatory inspection preparedness.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support audit-ready AML compliance workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how case workflows preserve evidence and decisions
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how SFTY manages sanctions screening and alert escalation
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Compare deployment options for secure compliance inspection readiness
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance inspection workflows?
faq_1_answer: SFTY structures fragmented compliance alerts, cases, decisions and reports into a controlled workflow to support regulated digital asset businesses preparing for regulatory inspections.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage sanctions and PEP cases?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes sanctions and PEP screening outputs into case workflows with review, escalation, decision logging and supporting evidence preservation.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and evidence packages to support audit readiness and regulatory review.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects provider outputs into one operational layer without replacing existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule or screening tools.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY connects outputs from multiple compliance providers into connected workflows rather than replacing them.
final_title: Prepare audit-ready compliance workflows with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY structures AML inspection cases, sanctions screening, alerts and evidence into one controlled operational workflow.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
